name: @atlasprotocol/example-dual-protocol-server
description: Reference event platform: a Hono service that exposes the four ATLAS endpoints (manifest, search, event detail, purchase) from its own in-memory event store. Shows how to wire @atlasprotocol/server-sdk + @atlasprotocol/mpp + Stripe so an event platform can accept x402 (multi-L2 USDC) AND Stripe SPT payments out of the box.
